# Vendored: @strudel/soundfonts

These files are vendored from
[`@strudel/soundfonts`](https://github.com/tidalcycles/strudel)
(AGPL-3.0-or-later, © the Strudel contributors), modified for Klappn —
notably a loop-seam crossfade in the font player to remove clicks on
sustained GM notes.

The GM soundfont data itself is fetched at runtime from
[webaudiofontdata](https://github.com/felixroos/webaudiofont) (Felix Roos's
repackaging of surikov/webaudiofont), whose instruments derive from free
soundfonts (GeneralUser GS, FluidR3) under their respective free licenses.

License of this directory: AGPL-3.0-or-later, same as upstream.
